title: With a Turkish ‘Abrazo,’ Istanbul Ascends as a Tango Capital
summary_full: Istanbul’s many tango schools, clubs and skilled dancers have won the city recognition, even among Argentine maestros, as a global tango destination.
summary_public: Istanbul’s many tango schools, clubs and skilled dancers have won the city recognition, even among Argentine maestros, as a global tango destination.
